reviews.review_description: This game 10 out of 5 stars it works perfectly my brother loves it and builds houses and animals . Subscribe to doubtnot on YouTube!

Thank you so much for checking out my game here! It's been a lot of work getting this up and running. I'm building this game by myself so please be patient as time goes on. I have a lot of plans to improve it but for now I hope you like it.

I really enjoyed trying this game out. I usually feel pretty sick after being in VR but with this being mixed reality I didn’t feel sick at all! 

The grabbing and letting go of the bricks can be a little bit finicky but still incredible considering the game uses hand tracking! 

I have played Build and Break (not AR) and the one thing I really want in the AR version is the guns! I could still spend hours in this game. Thanks DoubtNot for a fun game!!
